questions.question: What is the area of a circle with a diameter of 10?
What is the sum of the interior angles of a regular hexagon?
What is the length of the hypotenuse of a right-angled triangle with sides 5 and 12?
How many faces does a regular octahedron have?
How many vertices does a standard cube possess?
What is the total surface area formula of a cylinder?
What is the volume of a cone with base radius r and height h?
Which logical connective represents an 'exclusive or' (XOR)?
answers: At least one input is true

questions.question: What is a logical statement called if it evaluates to true under all possible truth value assignments?
What is the negation of the statement 'All primes are odd'?
answers: There exists at least one prime that is not odd
